subject: [PATCH 5/6] userfaultfd: gate must_wait writability check on pte_present()

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch modifies the userfaultfd code to gate a writability check on pte_present(). The check is intended to determine if a fault still requires userspace to handle it, and was previously being performed without taking the page table lock. However, this could lead to incorrect results when dealing with swap or migration entries, which share the same position as present PTE bits. By gating the writability check on pte_present(), the code ensures that only present PTEs are inspected, preventing incorrect results and allowing the fault path to retry if necessary.
